  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the schedule record was first created.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for labor cost calculations.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the schedule ceases to be effective; null for open‑ended.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the schedule becomes effective.']
  flexible_flag boolean [note: 'True if the schedule allows flexible start/end times.']
  jurisdiction_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter country code indicating the legal jurisdiction governing labor rules for the schedule.']
  labor_cost_rate_per_hour decimal(10,4) [note: 'Default labor cost rate applied for budgeting and cost allocation.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes or comments entered by HR administrators.']
  on_call_flag boolean [note: 'True if the schedule includes on‑call duties.']
  overtime_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether employees on this schedule are eligible for overtime pay.']
  rest_period_minutes varchar [note: 'Minimum mandatory rest period between shifts, expressed in minutes.']
  schedule_code varchar [note: 'Business code used to reference the schedule in HR and payroll systems.']
  schedule_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the schedule (e.g., \'Standard 9‑5\', \'Night Shift A\').']
  schedule_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the schedule pattern.']
  schedule_version varchar [note: 'Version number for change management of the schedule definition.']
  shift_pattern varchar [note: 'Textual description of the shift rotation (e.g., \'Mon‑Wed‑Fri 08:00‑16:00\').']
  time_zone varchar [note: 'IANA time‑zone identifier for the schedule (e.g., \'America/New_York\').']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the schedule record.']
  weekly_hours decimal(5,2) [note: 'Total number of hours an employee is expected to work per week under this schedule.']
  work_location_type varchar [note: 'Category of work location associated with the schedule.']
  work_schedule_description varchar [note: 'Free‑form description providing additional context about the schedule.']
  work_schedule_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the schedule.']

  Note: 'Employee work schedule master defining the standard working pattern assigned to an employee or position. Captures schedule type (standard 9-5, shift rotation, compressed week, flexible, on-call), total weekly hours, shift pattern details, time zone, work location type (office, remote, hybrid), effective date range, and applicable jurisdiction for labor law compliance (overtime thresholds, rest period requirements). Supports time and attendance management and labor cost allocation.'
}

Table workforce.time_entry {
  time_entry_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for each time entry record.']
  adjusted_time_entry_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on time_entry (adjusted_time_entry_id)']
  approver_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manager or supervisor who approved the time entry.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manager or supervisor who approved the time entry.']
  payroll_period_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the payroll cycle used for compensation processing.']
  primary_time_employee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the employee who logged the time.']
  timesheet_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the parent timesheet containing this entry.']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Workflow status indicating whether the entry has been reviewed and approved.']
  approval_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the entry received its final approval.']
  billable_rate_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'Monetary amount per hour charged for billable time.']
  billable_rate_currency varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 code of the currency used for the billable rate.']
  break_duration_minutes varchar [note: 'Total minutes of break time deducted from payable hours.']
  clock_in_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact moment the employee started work for this entry.']
  clock_out_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact moment the employee finished work for this entry.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the organizational cost center for financial allocation.']
  created_by_user varchar [note: 'Username of the employee or system that created the record.']
  entry_date date [note: 'Calendar date on which the work was performed.']
  is_billable boolean [note: 'True if the hours are chargeable to a client or project; otherwise false.']
  jurisdiction_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter country code indicating the legal jurisdiction for labor compliance.']
  labor_category varchar [note: 'Broad classification of the work performed (e.g., engineering, support, sales).']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the latest modification to the record.']
  line_sequence varchar [note: 'Ordinal position of the entry within the timesheet.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Optional textual remarks provided by the employee for this entry.']
  overtime_eligible boolean [note: 'True if the employee may accrue overtime hours according to applicable regulations.']
  overtime_hours decimal(5,2) [note: 'Portion of total hours that are compensated at an overtime rate.']
  project_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the project or cost center charged for this time entry.']
  regular_hours decimal(5,2) [note: 'Portion of total hours that are compensated at the standard rate.']
  shift_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the work shift (e.g., day, night, swing).']
  submitted_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time the employee submitted the time entry.']
  time_entry_type varchar [note: 'Category describing the nature of the work logged.']
  total_billable_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Calculated as billable_rate_amount multiplied by billable hours.']
  total_hours_worked decimal(5,2) [note: 'Sum of all worked hours for the entry, expressed in decimal hours.']
  updated_by_user varchar [note: 'Username of the person or process that last modified the record.']
  work_location_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the location or remote setting for the time entry.']

  Note: 'Employee time and attendance entry record capturing actual hours worked per day or pay period. Stores entry date, clock-in time, clock-out time, total regular hours, overtime hours, break duration, project or cost center allocation, time entry type (regular, overtime, holiday, on-call, travel), approval status, and approver reference. Supports payroll calculation, labor cost allocation to payment processing projects, and compliance with jurisdiction-specific overtime regulations.'
}

Table workforce.workforce_location {
  workforce_location_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for each workforce location record.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to ledger.cost_center. Business justification: Facility cost reporting requires each location to be assigned a cost center; cost_center_id provides that mapping.']
  country_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.country. Business justification: Location compliance and jurisdictional risk assessments require linking to reference country data.']
  legal_entity_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the legal entity that owns or operates the location.']
  parent_location_workforce_location_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the parent location in the organizational hierarchy (null if top‑level).']
  parent_workforce_location_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on workforce_location (parent_workforce_location_id)']
  timezone_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.timezone. Business justification: Shift scheduling and labor law compliance depend on accurate timezone reference from master timezone table.']
  address_line1 varchar [note: 'Primary street address of the location.']
  address_line2 varchar [note: 'Secondary address information (suite, floor, etc.).']
  audit_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the most recent audit.']
  capacity_people varchar [note: 'Maximum number of personnel that can be accommodated at the location.']
  city varchar [note: 'City where the location is situated.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Overall compliance posture of the location with applicable regulations.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the location record was first created in the system.']
  data_retention_policy varchar [note: 'Policy identifier governing how long records associated with this location are retained.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the location became active for workforce assignments.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the location is scheduled to be de‑commissioned or become inactive (null if open‑ended).']
  email_address varchar [note: 'Primary email address for the location.']
  floor_area_sqft decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total usable floor area of the location in square feet.']
  is_remote_work_allowed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether employees may be assigned to work remotely from this location.']
  is_virtual_location boolean [note: 'True if the location represents a virtual/remote/home office rather than a physical site.']
  last_audit_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent compliance or internal audit performed on the location.']
  latitude decimal(9,6) [note: 'Geographic latitude of the location in decimal degrees.']
  location_code varchar [note: 'Business‑assigned unique code used to reference the location in internal systems.']
  location_type varchar [note: 'Category describing the nature of the location.']
  longitude decimal(9,6) [note: 'Geographic longitude of the location in decimal degrees.']
  payroll_tax_exempt_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether payroll taxes are exempt for employees assigned to this location.']
  phone_number varchar [note: 'Primary telephone number for the location.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal or ZIP code for the location.']
  region_code varchar [note: 'Internal code representing the broader geographic region (e.g., "EMEA", "APAC").']
  regulated_premises_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the location is a regulated financial‑services premises subject to PCI DSS or other financial regulations.']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numerical risk rating assigned to the location based on security, compliance, and operational factors.']
  state_province varchar [note: 'State or province of the location.']
  tax_jurisdiction_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the tax jurisdiction applicable to the location.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the location record.']
  workforce_location_description varchar [note: 'Free‑form description providing additional context about the location.']
  workforce_location_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the work location (e.g., "London Headquarters").']
  workforce_location_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the location.']

  Note: 'Employee work location master capturing the physical and virtual work locations assigned to employees. Stores location name, location type (headquarters, regional office, branch, data center, remote/home), address, country, city, time zone, legal entity, and whether the location is a regulated financial services premises. Supports multi-jurisdiction payroll tax calculations, real estate planning, and regulatory reporting of employee distribution across the 200+ country footprint.'
}

Table workforce.hr_case {
  hr_case_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for the HR case record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the HR business partner responsible for managing the case.']
  primary_assigned_hr_partner_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the HR business partner responsible for managing the case.']
  related_hr_case_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on hr_case (related_hr_case_id)']
  case_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the issue, including relevant facts and context.']
  case_number varchar [note: 'Human‑readable business identifier for the case, used in communications and reporting.']
  case_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the case.']
  case_type varchar [note: 'Category of the HR case indicating the nature of the employee relations issue.']
  closed_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the case reached a terminal state (closed or resolved).']
  compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the case triggers regulatory or compliance reporting obligations.']
  confidentiality_classification varchar [note: 'Data classification level governing access to the case details.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'System timestamp when the record was first persisted.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for the resolution amount.']
  escalation_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the case has been escalated beyond the initial HR partner.']
  escalation_level varchar [note: 'Level of escalation applied to the case, if any.']
  investigation_notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes recorded by investigators during case handling.']
  legal_counsel_involved_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether legal counsel is participating in the case.']
  opened_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the case was initially created in the system.']
  priority varchar [note: 'Business‑defined priority level for handling the case.']
  related_policy_code varchar [note: 'Reference code of the internal policy implicated by the case.']
  resolution_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary value associated with the case resolution (e.g., compensation, penalty).']
  resolution_date date [note: 'Date on which the case resolution was finalized.']
  resolution_type varchar [note: 'Outcome category applied when the case is resolved.']
  source_channel varchar [note: 'Channel through which the case was initially reported.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'System timestamp of the most recent update to the record.']

  Note: 'HR case management record for employee relations inquiries, grievances, and investigations. Captures case type (grievance, harassment complaint, whistleblower report, accommodation request, policy violation, workplace investigation), case status (open, under investigation, resolved, escalated, closed), case priority, assigned HR business partner, legal counsel involvement flag, resolution type, resolution date, and confidentiality classification. Supports employee relations governance and regulatory reporting obligations.'
}

Table workforce.succession_plan {
  succession_plan_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the succession plan record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manager responsible for maintaining the succession plan.']
  job_profile_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the critical role for which a successor is being planned.']
  primary_succession_position_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the critical role for which a successor is being planned.']
  primary_succession_successor_employee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the employee designated as the successor.']
  superseded_succession_plan_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on succession_plan (superseded_succession_plan_id)']
  target_role_position_id varchar [note: 'FK to workforce.position']
  confidentiality_level varchar [note: 'Data classification level indicating how the succession plan should be handled.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the succession plan record was first created.']
  development_actions varchar [note: 'Planned development activities, training, or experiences required for the successor.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the succession plan becomes effective.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the succession plan expires or is superseded (null if open‑ended).']
  last_reviewed_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent review of the succession plan.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or comments about the succession plan.']
  plan_code varchar [note: 'External business identifier or code used to reference the succession plan.']
  plan_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the succession plan.']
  plan_review_date date [note: 'Date on which the succession plan is scheduled for formal review.']
  readiness_timeline varchar [note: 'Estimated time horizon for the successor to be ready to assume the role.']
  risk_rating varchar [note: 'Risk rating indicating the likelihood of losing the successor or the role (high, medium, low).']
  succession_plan_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the succession plan.']
  successor_name varchar [note: 'Full legal name of the designated successor.']
  target_role_title varchar [note: 'Descriptive title of the critical role (e.g., Head of Payments Operations).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the succession plan record.']

  Note: 'Succession planning record identifying critical roles and their designated successors within the payments fintech enterprise. Captures the target position or role, readiness timeline (ready now, 1-2 years, 3-5 years), successor employee reference, development actions required, risk rating (high/medium/low retention risk), and plan review date. Supports talent pipeline management for key payments operations, compliance, and technology leadership roles.'
}

Table workforce.equity_grant {
  equity_grant_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the equity grant record.']
  compensation_plan_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the equity compensation plan under which the grant was issued.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Equity grant is awarded to a specific employee; linking provides ownership, enables reporting and compliance, and eliminates orphaned grant records. No existing FK from employee to equity_grant, so no']
  legal_entity_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the legal entity (company) that issued the grant.']
  superseded_equity_grant_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on equity_grant (superseded_equity_grant_id)']
  approval_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the grant received final approval.']
  cliff_months varchar [note: 'Number of months before any units become vested under a cliff schedule.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the equity grant record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 three‑letter currency code for monetary values (e.g., USD, EUR).']
  exercise_price decimal(12,4) [note: 'Price per share or unit that the holder must pay to exercise the option.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Date after which the grant can no longer be exercised or vested.']
  fully_vested_date date [note: 'Date when all granted units become fully vested.']
  graded_vesting_months varchar [note: 'Total months over which units vest incrementally under a graded schedule.']
  grant_date date [note: 'Date the equity award was granted to the employee.']
  grant_number varchar [note: 'External reference number or code assigned to the grant for tracking and reporting.']
  grant_price decimal(12,4) [note: 'Fair market value of the underlying security on the grant date.']
  grant_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the equity grant.']
  grant_type varchar [note: 'Category of equity award: Incentive Stock Option (ISO), Non-Qualified Stock Option (NSO), Restricted Stock Unit (RSU), Employee Stock Purchase Plan (ESPP), or Phantom Equity.']
  is_approved boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the grant has been formally approved by the compensation committee.']
  is_taxable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the grant is subject to tax withholding at vesting or exercise.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or additional information about the grant.']
  performance_actual decimal(12,4) [note: 'Actual measured performance metric value at evaluation.']
  performance_metric varchar [note: 'Key performance indicator used for performance‑based vesting (e.g., revenue target, EPS).']
  performance_target decimal(12,4) [note: 'Target value for the performance metric that must be achieved for vesting.']
  tax_withholding_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of taxable value withheld for tax purposes.']
  units_granted varchar [note: 'Number of shares, units, or options awarded.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the equity grant record.']
  vesting_schedule_type varchar [note: 'Method by which the grant vests: cliff, graded, or performance‑based.']
  vesting_start_date date [note: 'Date when the vesting period begins.']

  Note: 'Employee equity compensation grant record capturing stock option, RSU, and ESPP awards. Stores grant type (ISO, NSO, RSU, ESPP, phantom equity), grant date, grant price, number of units granted, vesting schedule type (cliff, graded, performance-based), vesting start date, fully vested date, expiry date, grant status (outstanding, partially vested, fully vested, exercised, forfeited, expired), and the legal entity issuing the grant. Supports equity plan administration and SEC/regulatory reporting for publicly traded fintech entities.'
}

Table workforce.compliance_record {
  compliance_record_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for the workforce compliance record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the HR employee responsible for the obligation.']
  responsible_owner_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the HR employee responsible for the obligation.']
  superseded_compliance_record_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on compliance_record (superseded_compliance_record_id)']
  audit_findings_summary varchar [note: 'Summary of findings from the latest audit.']
  audit_trail_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier linking to the detailed audit trail for changes.']
  completion_date date [note: 'Date when the compliance obligation was fulfilled.']
  compliance_record_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the compliance obligation.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Result of compliance assessment for the obligation.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the compliance record was first created.']
  data_retention_policy varchar [note: 'Policy governing how long the compliance record is retained.']
  due_date date [note: 'Deadline by which the compliance obligation must be satisfied.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the compliance obligation starts being applicable.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the compliance obligation ends or expires, if applicable.']
  evidence_document_url varchar [note: 'Link to supporting documentation or evidence for compliance.']
  is_external_regulation boolean [note: 'True if the obligation originates from external regulator, false if internal policy.']
  is_mandatory boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the compliance obligation is mandatory (true) or optional (false).']
  jurisdiction_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO code of the jurisdiction governing the obligation.']
  last_audit_status varchar [note: 'Result of the most recent audit related to this compliance obligation.']
  last_review_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent compliance review.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional comments or notes regarding the compliance record.']
  obligation_number varchar [note: 'External reference number for the compliance obligation.']
  obligation_type varchar [note: 'Category of the compliance obligation.']
  regulatory_framework varchar [note: 'Regulatory jurisdiction or framework governing the obligation.']
  remediation_action_required boolean [note: 'Indicates if remediation actions are required due to non-compliance.']
  remediation_due_date date [note: 'Deadline for completing remediation actions.']
  remediation_status varchar [note: 'Current status of remediation actions.']
  reporting_frequency varchar [note: 'How often the compliance obligation must be reported.']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Risk rating associated with non-compliance of this obligation.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'System of record where the compliance data originated.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the compliance record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version of the compliance record for change tracking.']

  Note: 'HR compliance record tracking mandatory regulatory obligations specific to the workforce domain — distinct from the enterprise compliance domain. Captures compliance obligation type (right-to-work verification, I-9/work authorization, mandatory reporting of licensed personnel to regulators, fit-and-proper assessments for senior managers under SM&CR/MiFID II, pay equity audit, EEO-1 filing), obligation status, due date, completion date, responsible HR owner, and jurisdiction. Ensures the payments fintech enterprise meets workforce-specific regulatory requirements across all operating jurisdictions.'
}

  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the objective record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for objective. Referenced by alignment_objective_id.'
}

Table workforce.benefit_plan {
  benefit_plan_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for benefit_plan']

  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance standing of the plan with regulatory requirements.']
  contribution_employee_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary amount contributed by the employee per pay period.']
  contribution_employee_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of the benefit cost contributed by the employee.']
  contribution_employer_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary amount contributed by the employer per pay period.']
  contribution_employer_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of the benefit cost contributed by the employer.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the benefit plan record was first created.']
  description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the benefit plan offering.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the benefit plan ceases to be active (nullable for open‑ended).']

  last_review_date date [note: 'Date when the benefit plan was last reviewed for compliance or renewal.']
  last_review_user varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user who performed the last review.']
  payroll_deduction_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether contributions are deducted via payroll.']
  plan_category varchar [note: 'Higher‑level grouping of the plan (e.g., health, retirement, wellness).']
  plan_code varchar [note: 'External code used to reference the benefit plan.']
  plan_cost_per_employee decimal(12,2) [note: 'Average cost of the plan per enrolled employee.']
  plan_cost_total decimal(15,2) [note: 'Aggregate cost of the plan for all enrolled employees.']
  plan_coverage_details varchar [note: 'Specific benefits and limits included in the plan.']
  plan_coverage_level varchar [note: 'Level of coverage provided (e.g., basic, premium).']
  plan_currency varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 currency code for monetary values of the plan.']
  plan_eligible_employee_type varchar [note: 'Employee employment type(s) eligible for the plan.']
  plan_frequency varchar [note: 'How often contributions are collected (e.g., monthly).']
  plan_maximum_benefit_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Maximum monetary benefit payable under the plan.']
  plan_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the benefit plan.']
  plan_region varchar [note: 'ISO 3166‑1 alpha‑3 country code indicating the primary geographic region of the plan.']
  plan_taxable boolean [note: 'True if the benefit amount is subject to tax.']
  plan_termination_date date [note: 'Date the plan was terminated or will be terminated.']
  plan_termination_reason varchar [note: 'Reason for plan termination (e.g., merger, policy change).']
  plan_type varchar [note: 'Category of the benefit plan indicating its primary purpose.']
  plan_version varchar [note: 'Version number of the benefit plan definition.']
  plan_waiting_period_days varchar [note: 'Number of days after enrollment before benefits become active.']
  provider_contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address for contacting the benefit provider.']
  provider_contact_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number for contacting the benefit provider.']
  provider_name varchar [note: 'Name of the external provider delivering the benefit.']
  regulatory_filing_required varchar [note: 'Indicates if the plan requires periodic regulatory filing.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the benefit plan.']
  tax_qualified_flag boolean [note: 'True if the benefit is tax‑qualified under applicable regulations.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the benefit plan record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for benefit_plan. Referenced by benefit_plan_id.'
}

Table workforce.timesheet {
  timesheet_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for timesheet']
  amended_timesheet_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on timesheet (amended_timesheet_id)']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the employee who logged the timesheet.']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Current approval workflow status.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manager or supervisor who approved the timesheet.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the timesheet was approved.']
  billable_rate decimal(10,4) [note: 'Rate applied for billable hours when invoicing a client.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Free-text notes entered by the employee.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Internal cost center to which the labor costs are charged.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the timesheet record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the compensation amount.']
  expense_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total reimbursable expense amount reported on the timesheet.']
  expense_currency varchar [note: 'Currency of the expense amount.']
  expense_type varchar [note: 'Category of expense claimed.']
  hourly_rate decimal(10,4) [note: 'Base compensation rate per regular hour for the employee.']
  is_billable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the logged hours are billable to a client.']
  last_modified_by varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee who last edited the timesheet.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the last edit.']
  location_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the physical or virtual location where work was performed.']
  overtime_hours decimal(6,2) [note: 'Hours worked beyond standard schedule, eligible for overtime rate.']
  overtime_rate decimal(10,4) [note: 'Compensation rate per overtime hour.']
  period_end_date date [note: 'Last calendar date of the timesheet reporting period.']
  period_start_date date [note: 'First calendar date of the timesheet reporting period.']
  project_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the project associated with the work, if applicable.']
  regular_hours decimal(6,2) [note: 'Hours worked at standard rate.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the timesheet.']
  submission_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the timesheet was submitted.']
  submitted_via varchar [note: 'Interface used to submit the timesheet.']
  timesheet_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the timesheet (e.g., TS-2023-00123).']
  total_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total monetary amount payable for the timesheet (regular + overtime).']
  total_hours decimal(6,2) [note: 'Aggregate number of hours logged in the period, including regular and overtime.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the timesheet record.']
  work_type varchar [note: 'Category of work performed during the period.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for timesheet. Referenced by timesheet_id.'
}

Table workforce.payroll_period {
  payroll_period_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for payroll_period']
  prior_payroll_period_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on payroll_period (prior_payroll_period_id)']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the payroll period record was first created.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code used for payroll amounts in this period.']
  cut_off_date date [note: 'Date by which all time‑cards must be submitted for this period.']
  description varchar [note: 'Optional free‑text description providing additional context for the period.']
  end_date date [note: 'Last calendar date of the payroll period.']
  fiscal_quarter varchar [note: 'Fiscal quarter (1‑4) for the payroll period.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year to which the payroll period belongs.']
  is_taxable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether tax calculations are applied for this payroll period.']
  pay_date date [note: 'Date on which employees are paid for this period.']
  payroll_cycle_type varchar [note: 'Frequency with which payroll is processed for this period.']
  period_code varchar [note: 'Compact alphanumeric code used to reference the payroll period in downstream systems.']
  period_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the payroll period, e.g., "2023‑09 Bi‑weekly 1".']
  period_number varchar [note: 'Sequential number of the period within its cycle (e.g., week number).']
  processing_status varchar [note: 'Current processing state of payroll calculations for the period.']
  start_date date [note: 'First calendar date of the payroll period.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the payroll period.']
  total_employee_count varchar [note: 'Number of employees included in this payroll period.']
  total_gross_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Aggregate gross compensation before deductions for the period.']
  total_net_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Aggregate net compensation after deductions for the period.']
  total_tax_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total tax withheld across all employees for the period.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the payroll period record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for payroll_period. Referenced by payroll_period_id.'
}

Table workforce.team {
  team_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for team']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee who manages the team.']
  location_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the physical location or office where the team is based.']
  parent_team_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the parent team in the organizational hierarchy.']
  average_tenure_months decimal(5,2) [note: 'Average tenure of team members expressed in months.']
  budget_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Annual budget allocated to the team.']
  code varchar [note: 'Unique business code assigned to the team.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Regulatory compliance status of the team.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Financial cost center associated with the team.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the team record was first created in the system.']
  data_classification varchar [note: 'Data classification level applied to the team\'s data assets.']
  description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the team\'s purpose, responsibilities and scope.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the team became operational.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the team ceased operation, if applicable.']
  headcount varchar [note: 'Number of active members in the team.']
  is_cross_functional boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the team works across multiple functional areas.']
  is_remote boolean [note: 'Indicates if the team operates primarily remotely.']
  name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the team.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free‑text notes about the team.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the team.']
  team_level varchar [note: 'Organizational level of the team within the hierarchy.']
  type varchar [note: 'Category indicating the functional role of the team within the organization.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the team record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for team. Referenced by team_id.'
}

Table workforce.payroll_run {
  payroll_run_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for payroll_run']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the organizational unit responsible for the payroll run.']
  rerun_payroll_run_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on payroll_run (rerun_payroll_run_id)']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the payroll amounts.']
  employee_count varchar [note: 'Number of employees included in this payroll run.']
  gross_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total gross payroll amount before deductions.']
  net_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Net payroll amount after deductions.']
  pay_cycle varchar [note: 'Frequency of the payroll run.']
  payroll_period_end date [note: 'End date of the payroll period covered by this run.']
  payroll_period_start date [note: 'Start date of the payroll period covered by this run.']
  payroll_type varchar [note: 'Category of payroll run indicating the nature of payments.']
  record_audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the payroll run record was first created in the system.']
  record_audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the payroll run record.']
  run_code varchar [note: 'External reference code for the payroll run, used in reporting and integration.']
  run_date date [note: 'Date on which the payroll was executed.']
  run_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes or comments about the payroll run.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the payroll run.']
  tax_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total tax amount deducted from the payroll.']
  total_hours decimal(10,2) [note: 'Aggregate number of hours paid across all employees in this payroll run.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for payroll_run. Referenced by payroll_run_id.'
}

Table workforce.strategy {
  strategy_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for strategy']
  actual_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Measured actual metric value achieved by the strategy.']
  approval_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the strategy was approved.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the person who approved the strategy.']
  budget_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Financial budget allocated to the strategy.']
  code varchar [note: 'Business identifier or code used to reference the strategy in external systems.']
  compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the strategy is subject to regulatory compliance requirements.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the strategy record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for the budget.']
  description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative describing the purpose and scope of the strategy.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the strategy becomes effective.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the strategy expires or is superseded; null if open‑ended.']
  last_review_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent review of the strategy.']
  measurement_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure used for target and actual values.']
  name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the strategy.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or comments about the strategy.']
  owner_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee who owns or sponsors the strategy.']
  performance_status varchar [note: 'Current performance assessment of the strategy.']
  priority varchar [note: 'Business‑defined priority of the strategy.']
  related_strategy_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of a parent or linked strategy.']
  review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next strategic review.']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Risk classification associated with the strategy.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the strategy.']
  strategic_goal varchar [note: 'High‑level goal that the strategy aims to achieve.']
  target_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Planned target metric value for the strategy.']
  type varchar [note: 'Category of the strategy, such as growth, cost reduction, innovation, or compliance.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the strategy record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Incremental version number for change tracking.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User name or identifier that created the strategy record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for strategy. Referenced by related_strategy_id.'
}

Ref: workforce.payroll_run.employee_id > workforce.employee.employee_id
Ref: workforce.payroll_run.rerun_payroll_run_id > workforce.payroll_run.payroll_run_id
